# Rules Reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/rules-doc.sh --write. Do not edit by hand. -->

This document lists the currently registered solgrid rules by category, along with each rule's default severity and fix availability.

For a summary in the CLI, run:

```bash
solgrid list-rules
```

For rule-specific details, run:

```bash
solgrid explain <rule-id>
```

Notes:

- The current registry contains 89 active rules.
- `best-practices/use-natspec` is a deprecated config alias for `docs/natspec-function`, not a separately registered rule.

## Security

| Rule | Default Severity | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `security/arbitrary-send-eth` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/avoid-selfdestruct` | `error` | `-` |
| `security/avoid-sha3` | `error` | `safe` |
| `security/avoid-suicide` | `error` | `safe` |
| `security/compiler-version` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/divide-before-multiply` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/low-level-calls` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/msg-value-in-loop` | `error` | `-` |
| `security/multiple-sends` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/no-delegatecall-in-loop` | `error` | `-` |
| `security/no-inline-assembly` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/not-rely-on-block-hash` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/not-rely-on-time` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/payable-fallback` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/reentrancy` | `error` | `-` |
| `security/state-visibility` | `error` | `-` |
| `security/tx-origin` | `error` | `-` |
| `security/unchecked-transfer` | `warning` | `-` |
| `security/uninitialized-storage` | `error` | `-` |
